{{Infobox madra
| name = royal madra
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Royal [[madra]] is a rainbow-colored energy that serves as the unique signature of the [[Ninecloud Court]]. It originated from a spiritual mutation of [[pure madra]] within the Sha bloodline. This powerful energy allows users to manipulate, control, and disrupt the [[madra]] of others, a capability that has been refined through centuries of [[technique]] development. The ability to command the spirits of others is an innate trait present from childhood in those with this [[madra]]. Beyond its combat applications, such as warping space or countering techniques, royal [[madra]] is used to exert [[Authority{{!}}authority]]; for example, certain [[Divine Treasure{{!}}Divine Treasures]] made of this substance can allow a user to lend their political and conceptual command to others. The [[Ninecloud Court]] used this power to establish dominance over both their nation and the continent, which they named after their nine-colored cloud sigil.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara{{!}}Sha Miara]] possesses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[royal madra{{!}}Royal madra]] can be used to conjure the [[Nine-Light Mirror]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] uses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara{{!}}Sha Miara]] uses [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
